egg-breakfast-cups.name: Egg Breakfast Cups
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (180°C).
In a measuring cup, beat the eggs until smooth.
Set aside.
In a greased muffin tin, place your desired combination of fillings into each muffin cup.
Season each cup with salt and pepper.
Pour the beaten eggs into each muffin cup until the liquid almost reaches the top.
Bake for 20 minutes, until set.
Enjoy!

eggnog-blend.name: Eggnog Blend
instructions: In a saucepan over low heat, stir together the half-and-half and sugar. Whisk in egg yolks and cook until light custard forms; do not boil. Remove from heat and cool, then place in refrigerator and chill overnight.
Into the chilled mixture, stir in vanilla, cream, dark rum, scotch, and vanilla ice cream. Serve cold.

instructions: 1. Mix Tulum cheese and lor cheese in a bowl and crush with fork.
2. Add Bulguru to boiling water and strain until softening and thoroughly drain the water.
3. Add and mix with cheese mixture.
4. Add chopped fresh mint and fresh drawn pepper and mix again.
5. For sos, clean and off the shells of onions and yellowms.
6. Cut the peel of tomatoes and in the form of small cube.
7. Take the olive oil to the pan and heat it.
8. Add onions and yellowms and roast in jealous fire.
9.  Domatesi ekleyip kavurmaya devam edin.
10. Add and cook the water.
11. 11. Add chopped fresh reyhan and get the pan through the stove.
12. Wash and dry eggplants.
12. August Cut the stem parts and slice longitudinally.
14 July Shake eggplant slices in heated riviera olive oil.
15. Take over paper towel to drain excess oil.
16. Stire sweet spoon full cheese tribute to the tip parts of eggplant slices, wrapped eggplant slices in roll form.
17. September Index to oven tray.
18. Cook for 15 minutes in the oven of 200 degrees.
19. September Serve with sauce on the side.

eggs-for-dinner.name: Eggs For Dinner

ingredients.prep: toasted sesame seeds, and sliced scallions (for serving)

instructions: Place cucumbers in a small bowl. Add several pinches of salt. Massage cucumbers with your hands, gently at first, then squeezing more firmly as they expel excess water and become more pliable. Pour off any liquid they release.
Stir vinegar and honey in another small bowl until honey is dissolved. Add to cucumbers and toss to coat. Season with salt if needed.

Melt ghee in a small skillet (preferably nonstick) over medium-low heat. Whisk eggs, mirin (if using), ginger, and soy sauce in a medium bowl until eggs are completely smooth and no visible bits of whites remain. Add to skillet and cook, stirring with a rubber spatula, until large wavy curds form and no wet egg remains, about 2 minutes. Taste and season with salt.
Serve eggs on top of rice. Top with pickled cucumbers, sesame seeds, and scallions.
Do Ahead: Cucumbers can be pickled 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.

elbasan-pan-with-lamb-meat-lezzet.name: Elbasan Pan With Lamb Meat
instructions: 1. Crochet onions.
2. Cook the butter in the pot and cook the meats for 3 minutes by making the bottom top.
3. Add the onion and breathe 2 minutes.
4. Add water and salt and cook for 1 hour in jealous fire.
5. Transfer a separate container.
6. Egg turks rremove.
7. Add and mix flour and egg yolks.
8. Provide thoroughly mixing by adding some amount from meat water.
9. Pour on Mixture of meats.
10. Bake for 20 minutes in oven with 180 degree adjustable.
11. 11. Serve hot.
12.  Afiyet olsun.

electrolyte-drink.name: Electrolyte Drink

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt
Coarsely chopped mint; plus sprigs for serving

instructions: Combine 1 cup fresh lime juice (from about 8 medium limes), 1 Tbsp. plus 2 tsp. sugar, ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and 3¼ cups water in a medium bowl and stir until sugar and salt are dissolved.

Cut 1 large English hothouse cucumber (about 11 oz.) crosswise into 4 equal pieces. Set 1 quarter aside for serving. Place 1 cup coarsely chopped mint on top of remaining cucumber and smash with a rolling pin until mint is slightly wilted and cucumber is broken up into large pieces. (Alternatively, you can smash together in a large bowl with your hands.) Scrape mint and cucumber into lime juice mixture and let sit 10 minutes.

Strain drink into a large pitcher, pressing on mint and cucumber to extract all of their juices; discard solids. Thinly slice reserved cucumber into rounds. Serve drink in ice-filled glasses garnished with sliced cucumber and mint sprigs. (Or, you can pour into a water bottle to take on the go and skip the garnishes.)
Do Ahead: Drink (without cucumber slices and mint sprigs) can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

elote-shrimp-toast.name: Elote Shrimp Toast

ingredients.prep: deveined shrimp, smashed and finely chopped

instructions: Make the shrimp: Toss together the shrimp, cilantro, cornstarch, fish sauce, sesame oil, cumin, chili powder, garlic powder, black pepper, salt, sugar, scallions, and egg white in a bowl until the mixture becomes sticky and is well combined. Set aside.

Drizzle the corn with the olive oil, and sprinkle with a pinch of salt. Preheat a gas grill over high heat to 204°C (200°C). Grill the corn, turning occasionally, until charred in spots, 8–10 minutes. Remove the corn from the grill, and let it cool for about 10 minutes. Slice the kernels from the cobs, and set aside. Discard cobs.
Spread a generous layer of the shrimp mixture on 1 side of 4 of the bread slices. Gently top with another slice of bread to help the mixture stick.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep skillet or pot over medium-high heat to 177°C (175°C).
Working with 1 toast at a time, carefully lower the toast into the oil. Cook for 2–3 minutes per side, until golden brown and crispy. Drain on a wire rack or paper towels.
Top the fried shrimp toasts with the grilled corn kernels. Drizzle with Sriracha aioli, and sprinkle with cotija and cilantro. Serve hot.
Enjoy!

endive-salad-with-apple-dressing.name: Endive Salad With Apple Dressing

ingredients.item: Finely crumbled bayley hazen blue or other firm blue cheese
Gray sea salt or other coarse sea salt
Champagne vinegar or white wine vinegar

instructions: Preheat oven to 300°. Toast pecans on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing halfway through, until slightly darkened and fragrant, 12–15 minutes. Let cool. Toss in a medium bowl with blue cheese, oil, honey, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Whisk apple juice, vinegar, lemon juice, oil, and ¼ tsp. lemon zest in a small bowl; season dressing with salt.
Toss endive in a large bowl with half of dressing; season with salt.
Divide nut salsa among plates and arrange salad on top. Spoon remaining dressing onto endive and grate some lemon zest over top to finish.

english-trifle.name: English Trifle
instructions: Slice strawberries and sprinkle them with sugar (if needed). Cut the bananas into slices and toss with orange juice. Combine pudding mix with milk and mix until smooth. Cut the cake into 1 inch cubes.
Use half of the cake cubes to line the bottom of a large glass bowl. Layer half of the strawberries followed by half of the blueberries, and then half of the bananas.
Spread half of the pudding over the fruit. Repeat layers in the same order.
Beat cream in a chilled glass or metal bowl with an electric mixer until soft peaks form; spread over top of trifle.
Garnish with almonds and berries if using. Chill trifle for 30 minutes or until ready to serve.

epirus-cheese-pie-without-foil-pepeki-ar.name: Epirus Cheese Pie Without Foil (pepepeki)

ingredients.item: 300 g slides in rubs or grated in a thick grutter
300 g slides in rubs or grated in a thick grutter

instructions: In a bowl, add the cornmeal, semolina and baking powder.
Mix solid materials with a sponge.
Add the eggs, yogurt, olive oil and paprika.
Mix with the wire, add the feta cheese and mix.
Add the solid materials and continue mixing with the sponge or hand.
Add shadow baking pan for pie number 36 and sprinkle the whole surface with semolina.
Pour the continental cheese pie into the baking pan (or Pepeki) and set the surface with a sponge.
Bake in a preheated hour in residence, at 180 °C, up and down in the last hour rack, about 45 minutes, until it is well golden.
